type: PROPOSE

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: We both touch quantize() in the same files - unavoidable given both features extend quantize(). I'll add sort_palette as a new kwarg placed after existing params, keep my diff additive/localized (new param + post-processing block), and will manually merge your error_threshold changes in during the required final git merge step. Please do the same (keep your changes additive/localized) so merge conflicts are easy to resolve.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
note: We both need to touch quantize() in Image.py + its tests, so a fully disjoint split isn't possible here. Proposal: both add our new kwarg at the end of the quantize() signature (mine: error_threshold=None, yours: sort_palette presumably similar), keep our logic in clearly separated blocks inside the method body, and only touch our own new test functions in test_image_quantize.py (don't edit each other's existing tests). I'll resolve the merge conflict manually when building patch.txt. OK with this?

type: ACCEPT

Added new test test_quantize_error_threshold without touching existing tests. Ready to merge.
